hero.tagline: The best for the most complex.
hero.description: Denmark’s largest dedicated zinc die-casting foundry. From simple brackets to the most intricate geometries — tolerances to ±0.05 mm, with casting, machining, coating, and assembly all under one roof.
hero.heroImageAlt: Precision zinc die-casting mold with brass fittings

valueChain.heading: Your part, from drawing to delivery
valueChain.description: Give us a CAD file. We return a finished, inspected component — cast, machined, coated, and assembled in a single facility. No supplier coordination. No quality gaps between steps.

steps.label: Design
steps.title: DFM Review & Prototyping
steps.description: Send your CAD files. We review, simulate, and optimise — first samples in 3–4 weeks.

steps.label: Cast
steps.title: Hot-Chamber Die-Casting
steps.description: 12 automated machines with robotic handling. Parts from 1 g to 3 kg, 24-hour operation.

steps.label: Machine
steps.title: CNC Post-Processing
steps.description: In-house milling, turning, grinding, and thread cutting to final tolerance.

steps.label: Finish
steps.title: Surface Treatment
steps.description: From Class A cosmetic chrome to functional corrosion protection.
steps.specs: Chrome · Powder coat · Wet paint · Laser engrave

steps.label: Inspect
steps.title: Quality Assurance
steps.description: Every part CMM-verified and SPC-monitored before it leaves the building.

steps.label: Deliver
steps.title: Assembly & Supply
steps.description: We ship finished products on your schedule, not loose parts.

industries.heading: Trusted across sectors
industries.description: 55+ years of zinc die-casting for industries where precision, surface quality, and reliability are non-negotiable.

items.name: Furniture & Design
items.description: Visible fittings and structural components for premium Scandinavian design brands.
items.clients: Fritz Hansen · One Collection · Montana · HOWE

items.name: Lighting
items.description: Precision brackets, housings, and heat sinks for architectural and consumer lighting.

items.name: Building & HVAC
items.description: Motor frames, window fittings, and ventilation components built for long service life.

items.name: Consumer Electronics
items.description: Cosmetic and structural housings where surface quality meets dimensional precision.

items.name: Automotive
items.description: Structural and interior components meeting automotive quality and traceability standards.

items.name: Industrial & Tools
items.description: Ergonomic handles, brackets, and mechanical components for professional equipment.

whyZinc.heading: Why zinc die-casting?
whyZinc.description: Superior precision, longer tooling life, faster production cycles, and exceptional surface quality — outperforming aluminum and plastic alternatives.

team.heading: Talk to the people who do the work
team.description: No call centres. No account managers who’ve never seen a casting machine. You talk directly to the engineers and specialists who handle your project.

testimonial.quote: PLACEHOLDER: Add a real customer quote here. Ideally from an engineering director or procurement manager at a named client — about Linimatic’s ability to handle complex geometry, their reliability, or the convenience of the full value chain.
testimonial.author: PLACEHOLDER: Client Name

cta.heading: Let’s talk about your next project.
cta.description: Send us your drawings or specifications and we’ll tell you exactly what’s achievable — simple or complex.

footer.brandDescription: Denmark’s largest dedicated zinc die-casting foundry. Precision zamak components from prototype to series production.

cookies.heading: Cookie Preferences
cookies.description: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site usage. You can customize your preferences or accept all cookies.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.description: Essential for the website to function. These cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Help us understand how visitors use our site to improve the experience.
